_comment: CHARACTER TEMPLATE - personal layer for one character, loaded
last in the cascade (global.json -> mud.json -> guild.json ->
DISCIPLINE RULE (spec 2.4): guild-specific config belongs in the
guild file, never here, or guild-switching breaks.
Copy this file to characters/<character>.json and edit freely -
the picker also scaffolds one automatically on profile save.
map_patches and seen_max are populated by the client itself
(manual map corrections / vitals-bar scaling) - safe to leave
empty and let it fill in over time.
